arts.ttl: Preview: Plymouth Argyle vs. Queens Park Rangers - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Plymouth Argyle and Queens Park Rangers, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: QPR defender close to returning from injury
arts.sum: QPR defender Liam Morrison appears to be close to returning from injury. The centre-back was sidelined by a knee problem soon after joining from Bayern Munich during the summer and had to wait until November to make his Championship debut. He impressed before picking up another injury and has not featured since the home match […] The post QPR defender close to returning from injury appeared first on West London Sport.
